svg.aria-label: episteme — Figure 1. Structural stratification of the epistemic posture (v1.0 RC). Three strata — doxa (top), episteme (middle), praxis (bottom) — traversed by the grain (결 · gyeol) of epistemic discipline. The episteme band now carries the three v1.0 RC pillars (blueprints · hash chain · framework synthesis) layered on the four v0.11 components.
svg.title: Figure 1 — structural stratification of the epistemic posture (v1.0 RC)
svg.desc: Arxiv-style figure. Three horizontal bands labeled DOXA, EPISTEME, PRAXIS. Doxa band lists nine named failure modes and the kernel artifacts that counter each (all counters shipped in v1.0 RC: CP5 Fence, CP8 cascade-theater verdict, CP10 Blueprint D). Episteme band holds the four principles, the seven kernel markdown files, the v0.11 runtime components grouped by role (texture of thought, texture of action, rationale, memory), and the v1.0 RC pillar row (Pillar 1 blueprints · Pillar 2 hash chain · Pillar 3 framework + active guidance). Praxis band holds the four canonical artifacts and the four delivery adapters. An accent sync pill bridges episteme to praxis.

g.text: reason from what is present; never flag what is absent
→ Unknowns field of the Reasoning Surface
hard question silently replaced with easier one, answered fluently
first framing persists; later evidence fails to adjust enough
sparse data assembled into coherent causal story; felt as discovered
constraint removed without reconstructing its reason
scorecard claim drifts from underlying reality over time
allow/deny sets < action space; uncovered actions default-allowed

svg.text: constitution · reasoning surface · memory · three pillars · ten hooks
FOUR PRINCIPLES · I – IV · every design decision descends from these

g.text: you never see reality — you see
every lens has a structural blind
The loop is the unit of progress
root claim + four principles · the axis every other file descends from
Core Question + Knowns / Unknowns / Assumptions / Disconfirmation · + BP-D six-field on cascade ops
nine doxa-patterns · each paired with the artifact that counters it (all shipped in v1.0 RC)
process + cognitive-style axes · per-axis metadata · control signal for adapters
five tiers — working / episodic / semantic / procedural / reflective · promotion gated
declared gaps · when this kernel is the wrong tool
primary-source attribution for every borrowed concept · no buzzword leak in body

text.tspan: Structural stratification of the epistemic posture (v1.0 RC).
The three strata — doxa, episteme, praxis — are traversed by the grain (결 · gyeol) of epistemic discipline; the v1.0 RC pillar row layers onto the v0.11 components.
